title: sagraea oligantha
intro: Sagraea oligantha is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Sagraea or the Red-bark shrub. The medicinal properties of Sagraea oligantha lie in its roots, leaves, and bark, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Sagraea oligantha include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. Sagraea oligantha can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
